reviews.comment:
No hay GNC, buen servicio. Solo tener cuidado de no llegar cuando hacen el cambio de turno, hay que esperar 20 minutos.

(Translated by Google)
There's no CNG, but the service is good. Just be careful not to arrive during the shift change; you have to wait 20 minutes.

reviews.comment:
Siempre muy amables. Pero Jachal crecio mucho. Es necesario una nueva estacion de servicio para no esperar tanto

Always very friendly. But Jachal has grown a lot. A new service station is needed to reduce waiting times.

reviews.comment:
Con fecha 16/01/24 pedí que me carguen 10 litros de nafta y en el medidor del auto marcó aproximadamente 8 litros. Por favor, hagan revisar las máquinas.

(Translated by Google)
On January 16, 2024, I requested 10 liters of gasoline, but the car's fuel gauge read approximately 8 liters. Please have the pumps checked.

reviews.comment:
Si venís desde  San Juan capital rumbo a Ischigualasto y debes de volver luego de visitar el parque, es tu única opción para cargar combustible en la zona. Trabajan rápido y bien. Los baños están en buen estado

(Translated by Google)
If you're coming from San Juan city towards Ischigualasto and need to return after visiting the park, this is your only option for refueling in the area. They work quickly and efficiently. The restrooms are in good condition.
